name: Hecate | SHRIFT
description:
There are no promises that will ring true with this one. You had managed to escape from the bunker after surviving your encounter with Empuse. Only to be surprised by a playful yet cruel girl...

My beloved Hecate, we stan the murderous brat here.

Now while Hecate is a tsundere, she's also a heartless murderous demon and so in comparison to even Arachne I've made her the most prone to murder. Her dirtying her own hands however isnt too likely.

Patch Notes

  • Added a little info about Hecate's Castle

  • Made her crueller to her Familiars, I think.

Its kind of funny how long it took me to get back to Hecate, but we're here now.

Warning: Rape, Life Drain, Death, Brat, Unwilling Body Transformation
creator: EvokedShadow
